title: Public Cloud Bucket Exposed — S3
description: The bucket 'github-files' on S3 (http://github-files.s3.amazonaws.com) is publicly accessible (HTTP 200). Anyone on the internet can read its contents.
action: Immediately set the bucket ACL / policy to private. Audit its contents for sensitive data. Enable access logging and review who accessed it.

title: Bucket Directory Listing Enabled — S3
description: Bucket 'github-files' on S3 (http://github-files.s3.amazonaws.com) has directory listing enabled — all stored objects can be enumerated.
action: Disable public listing on the bucket. Review listed objects for sensitive data and rotate any exposed credentials.

title: API Endpoint Publicly Exposed
description: The subdomain 'api.github.com' exposes an API endpoint to the public internet. Unprotected API surfaces allow data extraction and abuse of business logic.
action: Verify that authentication is required on all API routes. Add rate-limiting and request logging. Remove or gate any debug or internal-only endpoints.
